sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108419" key="u(poqewre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποθεωρ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n108419.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold up and look at,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τορεύματα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
